Modern Rock.description: Aggressive and loud; punchy drums and forward guitars.

Alt Metal / Emo.description: Balanced energy with vocal shimmer; ideal for your current style.

Acoustic / Introspective.description: Transparent and dynamic; preserves the 'human' feel.

Streaming Standard.description: Safe, versatile setting for YouTube and Spotify.

Heavy Metal / Djent.description: Maximum density and saturation for wall-of-sound mixes.

Pop / Radio.description: Bright 'Air' and tight low-end for maximum accessibility.

Hip-Hop / Trap.description: Sub-bass focus with crisp percussion and vocal presence.

Lo-Fi / Chill.description: Warm saturation with rolled-off highs for a nostalgic vibe.

EDM / Club.description: Highest energy; optimized for club sound systems.

Jazz / Fusion.description: High dynamic range; preserves instrumental nuances.

Classical / Orchestral.description: Ultra-transparent; zero saturation to maintain natural timbre.

Country / Americana.description: Warm mids and clear vocals for storytelling tracks.

Blues / Soul.description: Rich harmonic saturation to mimic vintage analog tape.

Podcast / Spoken Word.description: Optimized for vocal clarity and consistent speech levels.

Punk / Grunge.description: Raw, unpolished energy with aggressive soft-clipping.

Cinematic / Trailer.description: Huge dynamic shifts with a loud, impactful ceiling.

Reggae / Dub.description: Heavy low-end warmth with smooth, dark highs.

Indie / Dream Pop.description: Lush textures and airy vocals; moderate saturation.

Extreme Loudness.description: For competitive 'Loudness War' styles (use with caution).
